cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to solve this problem. Let me read it again. Jane was born on the last day of February in 2000. Today is her 16-year-old birthday. What is the date one week from today in MM/DD/YYYY? Hmm. So Jane was born on February 29th, 2000, since that's the last day of February in a leap year. But today is her 16th birthday, so we need to figure out what date that would be on. Wait, but February 29th only comes every four years. So if Jane was born on February 29th, 2000, then her birthdays would fall on 2004, 2008, 2012, 2016, etc. So her 16th birthday would be in 2016 because 16 years later from 2000 is 2016.
